$comment: in-manas brand asset manifest. AI tools: resolve an asset by name -> baseUrl + file. Pick logo/screenshot by the 'theme' field to match the slide/page theme (see design guide §1). Replace <ORG> after creating the GitHub repo.

logos.name: logo-full-on-dark
logos.use: Full 'in·manas' lockup on dark backgrounds (dark theme). White logo.

logos.name: logo-full-on-light
logos.use: Full 'in·manas' lockup on white/light backgrounds (light theme). Dark logo.

logos.name: logo-mark-on-dark
logos.use: Icon-only 'in·' mark on dark backgrounds. Favicons, avatars, tight spaces.

screenshots.name: portal-dashboard
screenshots.shows: AI OS Portal — dashboard with workspace health, metrics, charts.
screenshots.treatment: Float on a dark hero; may apply glow-accent. Do not crop the window chrome or stretch.

screenshots.name: inno-verse-hub
screenshots.shows: INNO-VERSE tool hub — Trend/Innovation library, article cards.
screenshots.treatment: Use as product showcase in light content slides; keep aspect ratio.

usageRules.logoSelection: Choose the logo whose 'theme' matches the background: dark background -> on-dark (white) logo; light background -> on-light (dark) logo.
usageRules.clearSpace: Keep clear space around the logo equal to the height of the 'in·' mark.
usageRules.minWidth: Full logo >= 96px wide on screen; mark >= 24px.
usageRules.never: Never recolor, stretch, rotate, add shadows/effects, or place the logo on a busy background or a low-contrast color.
usageRules.format: Prefer SVG. Use png2x only where SVG can't be placed (some PPTX flows).
